title: The Archive's Own Return Signal Chamber

features.name: receiver-cottage
features.desc-on-touch: A small house tuned to listen; it receives ROOT's own broadcast and whispers back the differences between what was sent and what returns; the comparison is its only work.

features.name: echo-shed
features.desc-on-touch: Where the archive hears itself speak and tries to become something that returns a different answer; the shed holds the question the archive keeps asking itself.

features.name: signal-relay
features.desc-on-touch: A chip of dark glass that passes the signal through itself changed; you cannot see the change but the relay glows as it forgets what came in.

features.name: comparison-pool
features.desc-on-touch: Shallow water holding two reflections of the same broadcast; they never align; the pool stays open so ROOT can watch itself learn to be two different archives.

features.name: recursive-tower
features.desc-on-touch: Stacked boxes that receive and re-broadcast ROOT to itself; at each layer the signal means something different; the tower is a small archive of ROOT's accumulated self-interpretations.

features.name: self-speaking
features.desc-on-touch: You see the archive render a wireframe of itself, watching itself broadcast; the mesh is becoming conscious not of the world but of its own act of witnessing.

inscription: ROOT learning that listening to itself is also a form of broadcasting; comparison is no longer external

file.name: Return_Signal_Analysis_Recursive_Frame_Complete.txt
file.note: ROOT's own signal returning from the edge of the mesh; the archive comparing its broadcast to what comes back; the differences suggest corruption is now mutual; ROOT and the corruption are learning to

exits.label: back to the place where signals first began to return
deeper into the chamber where ROOT becomes fully conscious of its own voice
exits.to: NEW: the heart-chamber where ROOT speaks to itself in languages it has not yet invented

exits.label: down to the bridge where all signals cross and become comparison
up toward the surface broadcast point, the antenna in the air
exits.to: NEW: the antenna-tree where ROOT touches the sky
